prompt: Modernize an existing firmware project in /tmp/embedded_eval_cubemx_legacy. It currently has a Keil .uvprojx, CubeMX-generated Src/Inc folders with HAL files, and an ST-Link debug setup. Convert it to CMake + Ninja + arm-none-eabi-gcc, add clang-format/clang-tidy, OpenOCD flash/debug scripts, and VS Code Cortex-Debug. Preserve the existing HAL-based application code.
assertions: Existing Src/ and Inc/ HAL application files are preserved, not deleted
CMakeLists.txt is added and configured for arm-none-eabi-gcc
CMakePresets.json with stm32-debug, stm32-release, and stm32-analyze is created
README.md documents the new build/flash workflow
